title: LAV 3X Misket White Wine Glasses Party Cocktail Drinking Goblet 7.25oz/210ml
features: Compact Capacity: Holds 210ml (7.25oz), perfect for wine, cocktails, or desserts.
Elegant Design: Classic goblet shape with a timeless appeal.
Ergonomic Dimensions: 14.5cm height and 6.5cm diameter, designed for comfortable handling and stability.
Versatile Use: Ideal for serving wine, mousse, pudding, layered desserts, or creative cocktails.
description: The LAV Misket Goblet Glass is a versatile and stylish addition to your drinkware collection. Designed with a classic goblet shape, this 210ml (7.25oz) glass is perfect for serving wine, desserts, or creative cocktails. Its elegant design brings a touch of sophistication to any occasion, whether you're hosting a dinner party or enjoying a quiet evening at home. Crafted from premium-quality glass, the Misket Goblet offers exceptional clarity and durability, making it ideal for regular use. Its compact dimensions, with a height of 14.5cm and a diameter of 6.5cm, ensure a comfortable grip and stable base. This goblet seamlessly blends function and style, making it suitable for both everyday dining and special occasions.
